reviews.comment:
El expendio de combustible 5 estrellas el la cafetería 1 estrella solo hay cafe para llevar sacaron las mesas desde la pandemia y no volvio nunva pero lo peor es q no tiene débito ni tarjeta de credito ni medios de pagos con qr solo efectivo !!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is supposed to be 5 stars, but the cafeteria is only 1 star. They only offer takeaway coffee; they removed the tables during the pandemic and they never came back. But the worst part is that they don't accept debit or credit cards or QR code payments, only cash!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtbDVYZGpnRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
UN DESASTRE , FALTA MAS CONFORT , LIMPIEZA,  ORDEN , TODO EL QUÉ PASA POR ENCON , PARA AHI Y NO SABEN ATENDER A LOS TURISTAS DE PASO  !!

(Translated by Google)
A DISASTER! It lacks comfort, cleanliness, and order. Everyone who passes through Encon stops there, and they don't know how to treat tourists passing through!
